title: hieracium ctenodon subsp. largatum
intro: Hieracium ctenodon subsp. largatum, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that has been used for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium ctenodon subsp. largatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
